title: Tableau Hot Iron Cleaner 50ml – Removes Sticky Deposits, Burnt Starch, Black Marks and Residue from Steam Iron, Dry Irons and Ceramic Soleplates for Smooth Ironing
features: EFFECTIVELY REMOVES STUBBORN DEPOSITS AND STARCH: Quickly eliminates sticky residues, burnt marks, limescale, and black deposits from iron soleplates to restore smooth ironing performance every time. It will not remove heavily burnt-on deposits such as melted plastics.

COMPATIBLE WITH ALL IRON TYPES: Safe and suitable for use on steam irons, dry irons, ceramic soleplates, professional irons, and ironing accessories like ironing boards, spray starch, and ironing water.
FAST-ACTING CLEANING FORMULA: Works quickly to remove burnt-on residue and stains, restoring heat transfer efficiency so clothes glide effortlessly, making ironing faster, easier, and more efficient.
SIMPLE AND EASY TO APPLY: Apply directly with the cleaning stick, cream, or pad, then wipe clean for a streak-free finish, keeping irons, steam generators, and hot plates in perfect working order.
MULTI-PURPOSE AND PRACTICAL: Ideal for removing sticky deposits from iron soleplates, hot plates, and steam irons, complementing other ironing aids and professional cleaning routines.
description: Hot Iron Cleaner Suitable for all types of irons Hot Iron Cleaner will remove sticky deposits that build up on the soleplate causing the iron to drag across the fabric. Use Hot Iron Cleaner to make your ironing better, faster and easier. About Tableau Based in Bexhill on the Sussex coast, our family business, RPM Marketing started trading in 1980. During the eighties and early nineties we were successfully distributing a number of cleaning and polishing
